description:
This advanced quiz tests deep knowledge of JavaScript error handling, covering serialization quirks and cross-context instanceof failures. It challenges developers with multiple-choice questions that go beyond typical try-catch scenarios, aiming to separate junior from seasoned professionals. The tone is engaging and slightly humorous, encouraging mastery of error handling.
Topics: JavaScript errors, error handling, serialization gotchas, cross-context instanceof failures
Audience: Intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers
